entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for its response and tolerance to temperature stress

entities.name: TEMPERATURE STRESS
entities.description: A complex condition involving high or low temperatures that affects plant growth and physiology

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL AND BIOCHEMICAL PROCESSES
entities.description: The internal biological mechanisms associated with the plant's response to temperature stress

entities.name: DURATION OF EXPOSURE
entities.description: The length of time the plant tissue is exposed to high or low temperatures

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Extreme heat that contributes to temperature stress

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Extreme cold that contributes to temperature stress

entities.name: STAGE OF GROWTH
entities.description: The developmental phase of the exposed plant tissue

entities.name: THERMAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a specific sorghum cultivar to adapt to temperature stress
